warehouse.title: Warehouse Management
whSettings.title: Warehouse Settings
whSettings.description: Configure warehouse flow and feature flags
whSettings.warningDesc: Toggling options below will affect inventory flow immediately. Only change after understanding the impact.
whSettings.wipOff: Issue materials deducts directly from MAIN
whSettings.wipOn: Issue from MAIN → Receive in WIP → Consume when production completes
whSettings.wipInfo: Enable when you need to know exactly where materials are on the production floor. Recommended for medium-to-large production scale.
whSettings.fgDesc: Separate finished products from raw materials in MAIN
whSettings.fgOn: Production output goes to dedicated FG warehouse
whSettings.fgInfo: Enable to separate finished goods inventory from raw materials. Provides clearer visibility into production output.
whSettings.shipOn: Pick → Stage in SHIP → Confirm shipment
whSettings.shipInfo: Enable for 2-step shipping with staging area. Recommended for operations with dedicated shipping docks.
